summary: Iter-2 design phase complete. 22 screens/states designed across 3 HTML mockup files: SOAT upload+manual+status flow (4-state badge), notification center rebuild (6 notification types, bell badge), ManageAttendeesPage UPDATE scope confirmed (list+edit, component-swap + state polish). Full UI copy in soat_ and notification_ prefixes. DocumentSlotPill→SoatStatus 1:1 state mapping documented. Pencil MCP unavailable — HTML mockups serve as design gate. Story 2.9 scope = UPDATE (no layout rework).

qualityGates.name: All SOAT states designed (Sin SOAT, Vigente, Por vencer, Vencido)
All 6 notification types have row templates
SoatStatusPage has all 3 live states (Vigente, Por vencer, Vencido)
AttendeesPage (Story 2.9) scope confirmed: list+edit UPDATE, component-swap + state polish
DocumentSlotPill → SoatStatus 1:1 mapping documented with localized stateLabel contract
NotificationBellButton spec documented (44px tap target, backend-sourced unreadCount, 99+ truncation)
All UI copy in Spanish (sentence case for buttons), soat_ and notification_ key prefixes
Design system tokens unchanged from iter-1 (no new tokens introduced)
UX flow rules documented for SOAT entry points and upload phases
Accessibility notes documented for all new components
Error messages mapped to API error codes
design_coverage_complete
qualityGates.detail: Verified: all stories have mockups and all required artifacts are present.

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.detail: Verified: all stories have mockups and all required artifacts are present.

keyDecisions.rationale: Inspecting codebase confirmed list+edit layout is fully implemented (attendees_data_view.dart, attendees_list.dart). No layout rework needed — only AppButton/AppDialog adoption, no hardcoded colors, loading/empty/error state polish.
Iter-1 created DocumentSlotPill with empty/valid/expiringSoon/expired states that map exactly to SOAT boundary rules. Reuse without modification.
New widget with unread badge sourced from NotificationsCubit.state.unreadCount (backend-sourced, not local). Named NotificationBellButton to clarify its scope.
All 4 entry points are visually discoverable on a single page. Manual entry is included as a grid option to reduce dead-ends and improve discoverability.

keyDecisions.decision: Pencil MCP unavailable — HTML mockups are the design gate
keyDecisions.rationale: Pencil desktop app not running. Following established pattern from iter-1: HTML mockups serve as design gate. Pencil frames must be created before frontend implements.
